svg.text: Radio Amateur Delay-tolerant Interplanetary Networking Testbed
Bringing NASA's Delay-Tolerant Networking to amateur radio — from terrestrial links to cislunar space
Built with: NASA Glenn HDTN 2.0 | Bundle Protocol v7 (RFC 9171) | Licklider Transmission Protocol (RFC 5326) | Contact Graph Routing
LTP deferred ACK + CGR multi-hop paths
Callsigns embedded in DTN Endpoint Identifiers:
Every bundle carries operator callsign in metadata — satisfies amateur radio regulations
All tiers can participate in DTN experiments
Real-time telemetry via HDTN REST API
LTP deferred acknowledgment with deep-space timers
Amateur radio clubs • Universities • CubeSat teams
